settings.title: Essential Instructor Education For Any Studio
Earn A JumpSport Credential + ACE CECs
settings.copy: Looking for a fresh, high-energy workout format to add to your fitness instruction toolbox? The JumpSport® Online Instructor Training Credential Course provides you with expert-led education on rebounding fundamentals, class design, and coaching techniques—plus, it qualifies for ACE Continuing Education Credits (CECs) to support your professional growth!

settings.title: Why Add Rebounding to Your Skillset?
settings.copy:
Rebounding is one of the most effective and joint-friendly workouts available today, combining cardio, strength, balance, and core engagement into one powerful session. As more fitness studios, gyms, and virtual training programs incorporate trampoline workouts, now is the perfect time to expand your expertise and stand out as an instructor.

What You’ll Gain From JumpSport Education:

  • ACE Continuing Education Credits (CECs) to advance your professional development
  • A deep understanding of rebound fitness principles and benefits
  • The ability to create and cue dynamic, results-driven rebounding workouts
  • Coaching strategies to engage, motivate, and retain clients
  • A competitive edge in the fitness industry with an in-demand specialty

settings.title: Flexible, Online, and Self-Paced
settings.copy:
This comprehensive course is designed for busy fitness professionals! With on-demand video modules, interactive lessons, and expert instruction, you can complete the training at your own pace—anytime, anywhere.

Who Should Take This Course?

  • Certified fitness professionals looking to teach a rebounding class or training session
  • Group fitness instructors seeking innovative, low-impact workouts
  • Personal trainers wanting to add variety to client programming
  • Studio owners aiming to introduce rebounding to their class offerings
  • Exercise enthusiasts looking to advance their fitness career

settings.title: Stand Out & Elevate Your Career
settings.copy: After completing this course, you’ll receive a JumpSport Certificate of Completion, demonstrating your mastery of rebound instruction. More importantly, you’ll have the knowledge and skills to confidently lead safe, effective, and engaging trampoline workouts—whether in-person or online.
